title: Xtra Springy Italian Tomato Bruschetta
description: A savory Italian dish featuring fresh tomatoes and a hint of vanilla, served in a dolsot stone bowl. This kid-friendly bruschetta is perfect for a quick snack or lunch.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Toast the Italian bread slices until lightly browned.
In a large bowl, combine the diced tomatoes, vanilla bean paste, coconut cream, olive oil, garlic, basil, salt, and pepper.
Stir the mixture until the tomatoes are well coated with the other ingredients.
Spoon the tomato mixture over the toasted bread slices.
Place the dolsot stone bowl in the oven for 2 minutes to warm it up.
Remove the stone bowl from the oven and carefully place the bruschetta inside.
Serve the Xtra Springy Italian Tomato Bruschetta immediately and enjoy.
